basics.title: Let's start with the basics
basics.subtitle: Tell us about the special person in your life

name.label: What's their name?
name.tip: Tip: add pronunciation for clarity (e.g. Alicia: ah-lee-sha)

relationship.label: What is your relationship with this person?

occasion.title: What's the occasion?
occasion.subtitle: Help us understand the moment this song will celebrate

story.title: Share their story
story.subtitle: The details you share will become the heart of the song

story.label: Tell us about them
story.placeholder: Share memories, qualities, life journey, inside jokes, or anything that makes them special...
story.tip: The more details you share, the more personal your song will be

verses.label: Any quotes or verses to include?
verses.placeholder: e.g. a favorite quote, poem, or verse (optional)

genre.title: Choose a Genre
genre.subtitle: Select the sound that best matches your loved one

blues.label: Blues Subgenres
blues.subtitle: Choose the style that best fits the song

options.blues-melancholic: American blues with a more melancholic, soulful feel, expressive vocals, and crying guitars. Intimate and reflective. In the style of: **B.B. King, John Lee Hooker, Gary Moore**.
options.blues-upbeat: American blues with an upbeat shuffle groove, bright guitar riffs, and feel-good energy. Lively and uplifting. In the style of: **Muddy Waters, Chuck Berry, Stevie Ray Vaughan**.

vocals.label: Preferred Voice Gender
vocals.tip: We recommend choosing your own gender so the vocals feel personal.

qualities.title: What makes them special?
qualities.subtitle: Describe their character and the qualities you love most
qualities.subtitleSelf: What do you want to convey in your song?

qualities.label: Their beautiful qualities
qualities.labelSelf: What's been on your heart lately?
qualities.placeholder: Are they patient, wise, funny, encouraging, inspiring? What makes them an incredible person to you?
qualities.placeholderSelf: Are you in a reflective season? Facing something heavy? Or have you already come through something you want to remember?

memories.title: Share your favorite memories
memories.subtitle: **The more specific details, the better the lyrics we'll create!** Don't worry, you can add more information after completing your order.
memories.subtitleSelf: Do you have any moments and key events that shaped who you are today?

memories.label: Special moments together
memories.placeholder: What memories do you always come back to? A moment you laugh about every time? Something you went through together that brought you closer?
memories.placeholderSelf: What defining moments have shaped your life? What challenges did you overcome? What experiences do you want to hold on to forever?

message.title: A message from your heart
message.titleSelf: What do you want to feel every time you hear this song?
message.subtitle: Write anything else that you feel would be relevant to include in your song, and we'll do our best to include it!
message.subtitleSelf: Imagine playing this song back on a hard day. What do you want it to remind you of?

message.label: Special message
message.placeholder: What do you want them to know, that you've never said enough? What do you want to thank them for? What is that one thing from your heart you want to say to them?
message.placeholderSelf: Do you need reassurance, hope, peace, trust, identity, or strength? What truth do you want to hold on to when everything feels uncertain?

checkout.title: You're Almost There!
checkout.subtitle: One step away from gifting {name} a song they'll treasure forever
checkout.whatsappDescription: Optional - Used only if email delivery fails
checkout.reviewSurveyHint: Edit story, memories, and message without losing your order
checkout.changePlanModalSubtitle: Choose the best plan. You can change it now without losing any info.
checkout.changeGenreHint: Tap to change and listen to samples

orderSummary.title: Your Custom Song Order
orderSummary.extrasHint: Review extras and the final price before paying

modal.title: Edit the song story
modal.subtitle: Write as much as you want (no limit). Tap Save when you're done.

sampleSongs.title: Hear Other ApolloSongs
sampleSongs.subtitle: Listen to songs we've created for other families

guarantee.title: 100% Money Back Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with your song, we'll refund your purchase. No questions asked.

refund.title: Not satisfied? Get a full refund

time.title: 30-day guarantee
time.description: Plenty of time to listen and decide

personalized.title: 100% Personalized
personalized.description: Every song is uniquely written based on your story

revisions.title: Free Revisions
revisions.description: We'll refine until you're completely happy

orderBump.title: Make Your Gift Unforgettable
orderBump.subtitle: Special options chosen by 67% of our customers

fastDelivery.title: Rush Delivery 24h
fastDelivery.description: Last-minute gift? Get it tomorrow in your inbox — perfect for birthdays and special dates

genreVariant.title: More Music Styles
genreVariant.description: Want {name}'s story in another style? We rewrite the lyrics from scratch to match the genre
genreVariant.selectWarning: Select at least one style below to add

certificate.title: Gift Experience
certificate.description: We create an exclusive webpage just for your loved one. Send the link and watch their reaction when they discover the song was made for them. Get the tissues ready!

lyrics.title: Song Lyrics
lyrics.description: Picture the lyrics framed on your living room wall. Every day, you'll be reminded of this love. We send it ready to print.

extraSong.title: Double the Joy
extraSong.description: Gift another special person with an exclusive song at a special price
extraSong.anotherPersonDesc: Create a song for someone else

form.qualities: Tell us everything about this person
form.qualitiesPlaceholder: Share everything you know about this person with specific details (write freely)...

pendingOrder.title: We found an open checkout
pendingOrder.subtitle: Your answers are saved. Choose how you want to continue:
pendingOrder.continuePaymentHint: Open your previous payment link (pick up where you left off).
pendingOrder.reviewPlanHint: Check and edit plan, genre, and extras without losing anything.
pendingOrder.startNewHint: Clears everything and restarts the quiz from scratch.
pendingOrder.startedNewDescription: Your answers were kept. You can continue to create a new order.
pendingOrder.note: **No charges happen now.** You'll only be charged when you complete payment. The previous order will stay open until it expires.

navigation.terms: By continuing, you agree to our

audio.prompt: Don't want to type? Record an audio (up to 5 min) telling the story
audio.transcriptionHint: Your voice will be **converted to text** in the **field above**. Speak slowly, in **short phrases**, and **check** as you go.
audio.stopToTranscribe: When you're done speaking, click **Stop recording** for the text to appear in the field above.
audio.noSpokenAudio: We couldn't detect speech in the audio. Try recording again speaking closer to the microphone.
audio.maxTimeReached: Maximum time reached (5 min). Audio sent automatically.

validation.selectRecipient: Please select who this song is for
validation.enterQualities: Please describe what makes them special
validation.qualitiesMinLength: Please share a bit more about their qualities (at least a few words)
validation.memoriesMinLength: Please share a bit more about your memories (at least a few words)
validation.messageMinLength: Please share a bit more about your message (at least a few words)
validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.submitError: Failed to submit. Please try again.
